sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16678" key="a)strofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρο-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φέρω</etym>) <sense id="n16678.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing stars,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hymn.Is.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
